name: mikrotik-mac-spoofer
description: MAC Spoofing tool for MikroTik hotspot card rotation and quota management

scripts.build: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli/index.js && node --check src/utils/logger.js && node --check src/core/wifi-manager.js && node --check src/core/hotspot-auth.js && node --check src/core/proxy-server.js && node --check src/core/session-store.js && node --check src/core/quota-monitor.js && node --check src/core/card-rotator.js && node --check src/core/network-scanner.js && node --check src/core/deep-scanner.js && node --check src/core/arp-spoofer.js && node --check src/core/card-bruteforce.js && node --check src/core/session-hijack.js && node --check src/core/credential-capture.js && node --check src/core/session-detector.js && echo Build OK
